pred: The ground truth for fake news is established through manual annotation by a single expert, who labeled tweets as containing fake news or not.
answers: Ground truth is not established in the paper

pred: An extension of the NetVLAD approach that adds ghost clusters to the normal clusters, allowing for better handling of noisy or irrelevant content.
answers: extension of the NetVLAD, adds Ghost clusters along with the NetVLAD clusters
An extension of NetVLAD which replaces hard assignment-based clustering with soft assignment-based clustering with the additon o fusing Ghost clusters to deal with noisy content.
the attention model, MDREA, also outperforms the best existing research results (WAP 0.690 to 0.688)

pred: Context tweets and their corresponding labels are proposed as additional features, and the use of context tweets is also explored.
answers: using tweets that one has replied or quoted to as contextual information

pred: The proposed approach achieves better results than other word sense disambiguation (WSD) approaches employing word embeddings, as shown by the experimental results.
answers: GM$\_$KL achieves better correlation than existing approaches for various metrics on SCWS dataset.

pred: The ensemble method used is a "greedy ensemble" where the algorithm tries each model and selects the best ones to form the final ensemble.
answers: simply averaging the predictions from the constituent single models
